codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the final handoff and the current propagated branch anchor confirmed the packet finished the earlier partial O2C recovery work instead of masking it: dealer-receipt CODE-RED coverage was repaired to follow the shipped reservation-driven dispatch truth, changed-files coverage cleared the stacked thresholds, and the challan/dispatch/proforma/payment-mode review fixes remained protected by targeted tests. The review now anchors to branch-reachable commit `140ae266b089673dbdbe724b60946827c6afffe9` (`test(o2c): route dispatch truth coverage into pr-fast`) so the shareout packet does not overstate reachability from the old pre-restack closure id.

summary: Pass. O2C recovery closed its review comments, restored codered-finance, and passed stacked changed-files coverage at 97.04% line and 90.08% branch on branch-reachable commit `140ae266b089673dbdbe724b60946827c6afffe9`.
